devlens_investigate_schema.description: Input schema for the DevLens agentic investigation tool

question.description: Natural language observability question (e.g., 'Why are my API response times spiking in the checkout service?')

timerange.description: Splunk time range string for the investigation window. Examples: '-1h' (last hour), '-6h', '-24h', '-7d'

index.description: Splunk index to search. Use '*' for all indexes, or specify a specific index name (e.g., 'main', 'prod_logs', 'metrics')

devlens_spl_schema.description: Input schema for natural language to SPL translation

description.description: Natural language description of the query you want to generate (e.g., 'show me the top 10 endpoints with the highest error rate')

index.description: Splunk index context for the query

devlens_health_schema.description: Input schema for service health check

services.description: Optional list of specific service names to check. If empty, checks all services.

devlens_deploy_schema.description: Input schema for deployment impact analysis

service.description: Name of the service that was deployed

deploy_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the deployment occurred (e.g., '2026-06-11T14:00:00Z'). If omitted, uses the latest deployment event found in Splunk.

devlens_anomaly_schema.description: Input schema for time-series anomaly detection

metric.description: Name of the metric to analyze for anomalies (e.g., 'response_time_ms', 'error_count', 'cpu_percent')

service.description: Service or host to scope the anomaly detection
